title: Delegation Model
description: Defines scoped permission delegation between registry-backed identities. Delegation is strictly a permission-bound transfer mechanism and MUST NOT affect identity resolution, CIR authority, registry state, or federation behavior.

from_identity.description: Source identity (CIR/PIK only). AUID MUST NOT be used for authority resolution.

to_identity.description: Target identity (CIR/PIK only). AUID MUST NOT be used for delegation targeting.

permissions.description: Explicit permission scopes being delegated. Must resolve to RBAC permission definitions only.

delegation_type.description: Defines scope of delegation validity. MUST NOT modify RBAC semantics or introduce system-level authority escalation.

constraints.description: Non-authoritative constraints applied to delegation evaluation only. MUST NOT affect registry state, CIR validation, federation logic, or schema behavior.
